name: warm-intro
description: A friend introduces Lucas to a hiring manager. The 'introduced_by' relationship is the headline; no stage signal yet because nothing has been applied for.

input.subject: intro: Lucas <> Diego (Neon)
input.bodyText:
Hey both,

Quick intro — Lucas, meet Diego Aguilar. Diego runs the Postgres serverless team at Neon and is hiring senior backend folks. Lucas, you'd hit it off; Diego is super sharp on storage internals and you've been hacking on consensus protocols for years.

Diego, Lucas was at Cloudflare for 4 years on the durable objects team and is exploring what's next. He's mostly looking at distributed-systems-heavy roles in EU timezones.

I'll let you two take it from here.

Cheers,
Sam

relationships.sourceQuote: Diego runs the Postgres serverless team at Neon

expected.summary: Sam Alvarez introduced Lucas to Diego Aguilar, who runs Neon's Postgres serverless team and is hiring senior backend engineers.
